title: [FIRRTL] Update LowerMemory to handle HierPathOp ending in Module
body:
This commit fixes the `namepath` of a `HierPathOp` that is used by a non-local 
annotation on the `MemOp` being lowered.
The non-local annotation is now applied on the `InstanceOp` for the lowered
 `firrtl.memmodule`. 
(An alternate approach could be to apply the non-local annotation on the 
`firrtl.memmodule` instead of the instance.)
Update the hierarchy to end on the wrapper memory module, inside which
 the `firrtl.memmodule` is being instantiated. This might require adding
 the `InnerSym` on the `InstanceOp` that instantiates the wrapper memory
 module.

This ensures that the generated `HierPathOp` maintains the new format of 
ending on a module.
